title: Thyroid nodule documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.
red_flags.rationale: The exact information and warning-symptom section supports patient concerns, clinician concern, safety-net documentation, an entered plan, and questions only when discussed; it does not create referral or emergency instructions.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.1.6 — information and thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms

examination.text: Supports clinician assessment of palpable thyroid enlargement or focal nodularity, recommendation-qualified ultrasound, compression symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.
examination.rationale: The exact thyroid-enlargement section supports documenting onset or growth context, pressure-related symptoms, relevant negatives, focused thyroid or neck examination, and already available thyroid results without diagnosing a benign or malignant nodule.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports clinician assessment of palpable thyroid enlargement or focal nodularity, recommendation-qualified ultrasound, compression symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.9.1–1.9.8 — thyroid enlargement with normal thyroid function

additions.text: Supports clinician assessment of palpable thyroid enlargement or focal nodularity, recommendation-qualified ultrasound, compression symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.
additions.rationale: The exact thyroid-enlargement section supports documenting onset or growth context, pressure-related symptoms, relevant negatives, focused thyroid or neck examination, and already available thyroid results without diagnosing a benign or malignant nodule.
additions.evidence_extract: Supports clinician assessment of palpable thyroid enlargement or focal nodularity, recommendation-qualified ultrasound, compression symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.9.1–1.9.8 — thyroid enlargement with normal thyroid function

additions.text: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.
additions.rationale: The exact information and warning-symptom section supports patient concerns, clinician concern, safety-net documentation, an entered plan, and questions only when discussed; it does not create referral or emergency instructions.
additions.evidence_extract: Supports shared decision documentation, thyroid-medicine interaction information, and specific thyroid-enlargement warning symptoms including shortness of breath, rapid growth, hoarse voice, and swallowing difficulty.

source_limitations: How the nodule was identified, exact growth, pain, tenderness, voice, swallowing, breathing, thyroid dysfunction, inflammatory symptoms, irradiation, family history, pregnancy, ultrasound, cytology, thyroid function, nodes, diagnosis, referral, surveillance, and plan remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
